style_effects: Gentle, translucent water droplets cling to Alakazam's limbs and forehead, slowly drifting upward like suspended pearls. A soft, cool blue light emanates from its pores, casting shimmering ripples across the surrounding air, while delicate bubbles rise in slow motion, reflecting faint light from an unseen source. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
